_help_Name: Descriptive name of the chassis subsystem
Name: Sedan chassis
_help_Components: Chassis rigid body components. Total mass/inertia are calculated as their composite properties.
_help_DriverPosition: Driver's seat location and orientation relative to chassis origin
_help_RearConnectorLocation: Mounting point coordinate for rear trailer connectors (optional)
_help_Contact_Optional: Optional: Define collision geometry. Example: 'Contact': { 'Materials': [ { 'Coefficient of Friction': 0.8, 'Coefficient of Restitution': 0.1 } ], 'Shapes': [ { 'Type': 'BOX', 'Material Index': 0, 'Location': [0, 0, 0.5], 'Orientation': [1, 0, 0, 0], 'Dimensions': [3.0, 1.5, 1.0] } ] }
_help_Visualization: Mesh or geometric primitives for chassis rendering
